lines.speaker: Elder Blunn
lines.text: Ah, human. Are you in need of a spear or shield?

lines.speaker: Elder Blunn
lines.text: I do. It is an important service I provide to our people. My spears in particular are quite desirable.

lines.speaker: Elder Blunn
lines.text: All tortugans must make their own spear as part of their Trial by Water, but those spears are quite personal and many prefer not to risk damaging them.

lines.speaker: Elder Blunn
lines.text: My spears are of high quality, but lack the sentimental elements. They are seen as ideal by many tortugans. Would you like to buy one? Or perhaps you'd be more interested in something else I have for sale?
